name: Smack-Aroni & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the cheeses in about 1/2 inch squares.
2. In a greased casserole dish, arrange a layer of macaroni and then a layer of the three cheeses. Alternate these layers, ending with cheese on top. Season each layer.
3. To make the sauce, combine 1 tablespoon butter and 1 tablespoon flour in a double boiler or over low heat. Gradually whisk in 1 cup milk until smooth.
4. Pour the sauce over the casserole and top with buttered crumbs and a sprinkling of more parmesan cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until brown and bubbly. Serves about 6.
